submission_title: AI-Assisted Hypothesis Verification of Geometric Unity: A Moonstar Physics Review
abstract: An AI-assisted hypothesis-verification review of Geometric Unity by Eric Weinstein, testing 4 curated claims via the Moonstar physics-hypothesis pipeline (deterministic conservation-law/QM/dimension checks cross-examined by an LLM theory critic and devil's advocate). Verdicts: 1 error, 3 inconclusive.
license_note: ScienceOpen applies CC BY 4.0 and a CrossRef DOI automatically upon acceptance — no action needed here.
